title: Rahul pats TPCC chief for successful conduct of DCC presidents’ training camp
fullText: TPCC president and MLC Mahesh Kumar Goud received special appreciation on Monday at the valedictory session of the ten-day training camp organised for District Congress Committee (DCC) presidents.His leadership during the programme drew wide applause, particularly after Congress leader Rahul Gandhi commended him saying, “Well done, Mahesh.”Throughout the ten-day programme, Mr. Goud was actively involved in planning, coordinating and monitoring each session. His consistent presence and hands-on approach reportedly boosted the morale of party functionaries. Organisers noted that the smooth execution of the camp from programme design to day-to-day implementation reflected his discipline, perseverance and organisational skill.Addressing the gathering, Sachin Rao, chairman of Sanghatan-Srujan initiative, praised Mr. Goud for ensuring that every session was conducted effectively. Party leaders also said the training camp, conducted under Mr. Goud’s leadership, has infused new energy into the organisation. Published - March 04, 2026 12:29 am IST
